titleStmt.title: SII 36.293: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 293. (A.R. No. 293 of 1910.) PULIPPARKŌYIL, MADHURANTAKAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Vyāghrapādēśvara temple.

summary.p: Records the rates of assessment of taxes like paṭṭadai-nūlāyam, pērāyac-cammādam, daṇṇāyakkar-makamai and other taxes levied on cheṭṭis, kaikkōḷas, vāṇiyars settled in the tirumaḍaiviḷāgam of the temple of Tiruppulippagava Nāyaṉār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vīrapukkaṇa Uṭaiyārkkuc cellāniṉṟa śubhānu varuṣam
vaikāci maSymbol for ‘mātam’ 10 8 ku tiruppulippakava nāyiṉār tirumaṭaiviḷākam pulippakavar koyil
ceṭṭiyaḷ kaikkoḷar vāṇiyar perkkum paṭṭaṭai nūlāyam Āṭṭaicammātam
perāyac cammātam kaiyeṟpu Atikaimāta mātaviraṭṭi taṇṇāyakkar makamai
maṟṟum Āyattai nokkik koḷḷum pala Upātiyum Uṭpaṭa Āṇṭu Oṉṟukku per
Oṉṟukku koḷḷum ø 2(1/2)m taṟi Oṉṟukku koḷḷum 2(1/2)m koḷḷakkaṭavatu Ākavum
Itukku Akitam coṉṉār Uṇṭu Ākil keṅkaik karaiyil kārām pacuvaik koṉṟāṉ
pāvamuṅ koṇṭu tāṉ paṇiṉa cuk�taimum taṉakku Utavātāmākak kaṭavatu Ākavum Ippaṭikku Ivai
villavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 36.293 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
